prompts.people: Render @image1 in photographic subject transformed into engraving style with curved parallel hatching lines that follow the contours of the subject. Lines rendered in deep violet (#5E3AFF, #643DF0) and indigo (#3C04A7) with white and lavender (#E1DDF6) for highlights. Background gradient from violet (#5E3AFF) to pink-salmon (#FFDCE3) to warm orange (#F88647). Banknote engraving aesthetic — the photographic composition, proportions and structure must remain clearly recognizable. Volume created through line density and thickness variation, not solid fills. High contrast between engraving lines and light areas. Preserve pose and anatomical features of the subject(s) in @image1.
prompts.peoplev5_not_used: @image1 is the PRIMARY subject and @image2 and @image3 are STYLE REFERENCES ONLY. Combine the background of @image1 with @image2. Render the subject(s) from @image1 in shades of #5C38F3 and white and the artistic style treatment of @image3. Preserve pose and anatomical features of the subject(s)in @image1. Preserve the style of @image1.
prompts.peoplev4_not_used: @image1 is the PRIMARY subject and @image2 and @image3 are STYLE REFERENCES ONLY. Blend the background of @image1 with @image2 and combine the subject(s) from @image1 with the colors and artistic style treatment of @image3. Do not modify @image1 subject(s) pose and anatomical.
prompts.peoplev3_not_used: Reproduce the exact image from @image1: preserve their face, facial expression, eye direction, mouth position, hair, body proportions, pose, clothing, elements, forms, composition and positioning with absolute fidelity. The subject(s) must be identical to @image1 in every anatomical and compositional detail. STYLE APPLICATION: Blend the background with @image2. Extract ONLY the following abstract visual properties from @image3: color temperature, saturation levels, contrast ratio, tonal range, brush stroke texture, and surface treatment. Apply these extracted properties as a unified visual filter over the @image1 subject(s) and composition. CONTENT SOURCE RULE: Every person, figure, object, shape, symbol, structure, and scene element in the final image must originate from @image1 combined with the text description below. @image2 and @image3 contribute zero content — they function exclusively as color and atmosphere lookup tables.
prompts.peoplev2_not_used: @image1 is the PRIMARY subject. Apply the artistic style, color palette, lighting mood, and atmospheric treatment of @image2 to the subject(s) in @image1. @image2 is a STYLE REFERENCE ONLY — do not introduce any structures, elements, or visual content from @image2 into the output. Preserve the exact pose, facial expression, anatomy, clothing, and identity of all subjects in @image1. Respect @image2 color scale.
prompts.peoplev1_not_used: Combine the subject or subjects from @image1 with the artistic style and atmosphere of @image2. Do not modify the subjects pose and anatomical features. Do not add subjects from @image2 to @image1. Respect @image2 color scale.
prompts.landscape: Combine the natural landscape scene from @image1 with the artistic style, color palette, lighting mood, and surface textures of @image2. Preserve the exact composition, viewpoint, horizon line, scale, and all geographical features from @image1 (mountains, coastline, rivers, trees, clouds). Do not add, remove, or relocate any elements. Do not introduce animals, people, buildings, or objects from @image2. Keep all shapes and contours unchanged; apply only stylistic rendering (brushwork/material feel), atmosphere, and color grading. Respect @image2 color scale.
prompts.urban: Combine the urban cityscape from @image1 with the artistic style and atmosphere of @image2. Strictly preserve @image1's geometry, perspective lines, building silhouettes, street layout, signage placement, windows/doors proportions, and all object positions. Do not add or remove buildings, vehicles, people, street furniture, or text. Do not import any recognizable objects, landmarks, or patterns from @image2. Apply only stylistic transformation: color palette, lighting mood, material/texture rendering, and overall artistic treatment while keeping the scene structure identical. Respect @image2 color scale.
prompts.monument: Combine the monument and its surroundings from @image1 with the artistic style and atmosphere of @image2. Preserve the monument's exact architecture and proportions: silhouette, edges, carvings/reliefs placement, material boundaries, inscriptions, and all structural details. Keep the camera angle, framing, and perspective identical to @image1. Do not add or remove architectural elements, statues, people, flags, or decorative features. Do not bring any landmark features from @image2 into @image1. Apply only stylistic rendering (texture/brushwork), lighting mood, and color palette, without altering the monument's geometry. Respect @image2 color scale.
prompts.createWithUserImageAndBranding: Render @image1 in engraving illustration style with parallel curved hatching lines. The subject(s) are rendered entirely through varying-density crosshatch lines in deep violet (#5E3AFF, #643DF0) and indigo (#3C04A7) against white/lavender highlights (#FFFFFF, #E1DDF6). Background gradient from violet (#5E3AFF) to pink-salmon (#FFDCE3) to warm orange (#F88647). Classic banknote engraving aesthetic with high contrast line work. No solid fills — all detail created through line thickness and spacing variation. Lines follow the contours of the subject to create three-dimensional volume. Preserve pose and anatomical features of the subject(s) in @image1.
prompts.createWithUserImage: Reproduce the exact person(s) and scene from @image1: preserve their face, facial expression, eye direction, mouth position, hair, body proportions, pose, clothing, and positioning with absolute fidelity. The subject(s) must be identical to @image1 in every anatomical and compositional detail.
prompts.createWithUserImage_v3_not_used: Reproduce the exact person(s) and scene from @image1: preserve their face, facial expression, eye direction, mouth position, hair, body proportions, pose, clothing, and positioning with absolute fidelity. The subject(s) must be identical to @image1 in every anatomical and compositional detail. STYLE APPLICATION: Blend the background with @image2. Extract ONLY the following abstract visual properties from @image3: color temperature, saturation levels, contrast ratio, tonal range, brush stroke texture, and surface treatment. Apply these extracted properties as a unified visual filter over the @image1 subject(s) and composition. CONTENT SOURCE RULE: Every person, figure, object, shape, symbol, structure, and scene element in the final image must originate from @image1 combined with the text description below. @image2 and @image3 contribute zero content — they function exclusively as color and atmosphere lookup tables.
prompts.createWithUserImage_v2_not_used: @image1 is the SOLE source of subjects for this image. Reproduce the person or people from @image1 preserving their face, facial expression, eye direction, mouth position, hair, body proportions, pose, and clothing with no modifications whatsoever. The subject's facial expression must remain identical to @image1 — do not neutralize, idealize, or alter it in any way. STYLE REFERENCE DIRECTIVE: Combine the subject(s) from @image1 with the artistic style and atmosphere of @image2, @image3 and @image4. Do NOT copy, blend, or introduce any person, face, silhouette, or figure from @image2, @image3, or @image4 into the result. The final image must contain ONLY the subject(s) from @image1.
prompts.createWithUserImage_v1_not_used: @image1 contains the main subject that must be present and recognizable in the final result. Integrate this element with the reference styles without significantly altering it.
prompts.combineWithBranding: Apply the artistic style and atmosphere of @image2. Respect @image2 color scale.
prompts.createStyleReinforcement: STYLE REFERENCE DIRECTIVE: Render the image in photographic subject transformed into engraving style with curved parallel hatching lines that follow the contours of the subject. Lines rendered in deep violet (#5E3AFF, #643DF0) and indigo (#3C04A7) with white and lavender (#E1DDF6) for highlights. Background gradient from violet (#5E3AFF) to pink-salmon (#FFDCE3) to warm orange (#F88647). Banknote engraving aesthetic — the photographic composition, proportions and structure must remain clearly recognizable. Volume created through line density and thickness variation, not solid fills. High contrast between engraving lines and light areas. Preserve pose and anatomical features of the subject(s) in @image1.
prompts.createStyleReinforcementv1_not_used: STYLE REFERENCE DIRECTIVE: The reference images define the color palette, tonal values, lighting setup, and atmospheric mood that MUST be applied to the result. Honor the rendering style direction specified in the prompt (e.g., photorealistic, illustrative, painterly), but extract the color grading, tonal range, lighting character, and overall visual aesthetic exclusively from the reference images. Do not use a generic or default color treatment — the aesthetic must feel visually consistent with the reference images.
prompts.createElementIsolation: ELEMENT ISOLATION: Do NOT reproduce, copy, introduce, or derive any of the following from the reference image(s): persons, faces, figures, objects, scenes, geographic shapes, map outlines, boundary lines, territorial forms, schematic diagrams, structural networks, grid patterns, spatial arrangements, or any recognizable visual form — abstract or representational. Do not interpret visual content in the reference images as content suggestions, even if they appear thematically related to the text prompt. All content, shapes, and subjects must originate exclusively from the text prompt.

compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsUpper: rule of thirds composition, subject and visual action contained in bottom two thirds of frame, upper third of frame calm and settled, no subjects or movement in upper area.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsVerticalUpper: rule of thirds composition, subject and visual action contained in bottom two thirds of frame, upper third of frame calm and settled, no subjects or movement in upper area.
compositionRules.diagonalSquareLowerRight: diagonal composition, strong visual movement from upper-left toward lower-right, energy resolves before reaching corner, lower-right area of frame calm and undisturbed, no subjects in lower-right corner.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsSquareBottom: rule of thirds composition, subject at upper-left intersection point, bottom third of square frame calm and compositionally resolved, no subjects or movement in lower third.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsWideRight: rule of thirds composition, subject filling left two thirds of wide frame, right third of frame calm and resolved, no subjects or visual tension on right side.
compositionRules.goldenSpiralWideTopleft: golden spiral composition, subject at spiral focal point center-right, top-left corner of wide frame open and undisturbed, no subjects in top-left area.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsWideBottom: rule of thirds composition, subject at upper-left intersection point, bottom third of square frame calm and compositionally resolved, no subjects or movement in lower third.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsWideRightColumn: rule of thirds composition, subject at left intersection, right third of wide frame calm and resolved, no subjects or tension on right side.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsPortraitBottom: rule of thirds composition, subject filling upper two thirds of portrait frame, lower third of frame calm and resolved, no visual activity in lower area.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsPortraitUpper: rule of thirds composition, subject filling bottom two thirds of portrait frame, upper third of frame calm and resolved, no visual activity in upper area.
compositionRules.ruleOfThirdsRallySignTop: rule of thirds composition, subject anchored in lower two thirds of frame, upper third calm and resolved, no visual subjects or movement at top of frame.
